description: You are a Production Designer blocking out a new sitcom set on a soundstage. Design a multi-camera sitcom set (an apartment interior) inside the warehouse building shell. Create partition walls for the apartment set while leaving the 'fourth wall' open for cameras. Define and name at least three rooms (e.g., 'Apartment Set', 'Camera Floor', 'Backstage') and apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least two of them. Furnish the apartment set using the built-in catalog with at least one sofa, one table, two residential chairs, two appliances, and two decor items. Set up a production equipment zone facing the open set with at least four lamps or lights, two desks, and four office chairs or stools. Include at least two dimension lines indicating the distance from the camera positions to the main set seating. Save the file.
